content:
The reason we open LinkedIn has changed.

Five years ago, people came here to:

• Find a job.
• Hire someone.
• Network.

Today?

Many of us open LinkedIn just to see what our favourite founder, marketer, designer, or CEO has posted.

That shift is bigger than it looks.

Then I saw this :

60% of B2B buyers discover brands through creator content before they ever speak to a sales team.

Think about that for a second.

The first interaction with a brand isn't always an ad anymore.

Sometimes it's a founder sharing a lesson.

An employee sharing an insight.

Or a creator explaining an industry trend.

We're quietly watching trust shift from brands to people.

And I don't think we've seen the peak yet.

Brands spend millions to earn attention.
Some creators earn it with a single post.

Who's one LinkedIn creator you genuinely look forward to reading?
